entries.sentence: The tune was easy to remember.
entries.chinese: tune = 曲调；这段曲调很容易记住。

entries.sentence: The train went through a long tunnel.
entries.chinese: tunnel = 隧道；火车穿过了一条长隧道。

entries.sentence: We ate turkey for lunch.
entries.chinese: turkey = 火鸡肉；我们午饭吃了火鸡肉。

entries.sentence: Take the next turning on the left.
entries.chinese: turning = 转弯处；在下一个转弯处向左转。

entries.sentence: My twin wears glasses.
entries.chinese: twin = 双胞胎之一；我的双胞胎兄弟戴眼镜。

entries.sentence: This type of music is loud.
entries.chinese: type = 类型；这种类型的音乐很响。

entries.sentence: The car has a flat tyre.
entries.chinese: tyre = 轮胎；这辆车有一个轮胎瘪了。

entries.sentence: Take an umbrella because it may rain.
entries.chinese: umbrella = 雨伞；带上雨伞，因为可能会下雨。

entries.sentence: His unhappy face worried me.
entries.chinese: unhappy = 不高兴的；他不高兴的脸让我担心。

entries.sentence: The student union organized a party.
entries.chinese: union = 联合会；学生会组织了一场聚会。

entries.sentence: This unit of the book is about travel.
entries.chinese: unit = 单元；这本书的这个单元是关于旅行的。

entries.sentence: Stars fill the universe.
entries.chinese: universe = 宇宙；星星布满宇宙。

entries.sentence: Each user needs a password.
entries.chinese: user = 用户；每个用户都需要一个密码。

entries.sentence: The valley was green after the rain.
entries.chinese: valley = 山谷；雨后山谷一片翠绿。

entries.sentence: The delivery van stopped outside.
entries.chinese: van = 小货车；送货小货车停在外面。

entries.sentence: Vanilla is my favourite ice cream flavour.
entries.chinese: vanilla = 香草；香草是我最喜欢的冰淇淋口味。

entries.sentence: The shop sells a variety of hats.
entries.chinese: variety = 种类；这家商店出售各种帽子。

entries.sentence: Put the flowers in the vase.
entries.chinese: vase = 花瓶；把花放进花瓶里。

entries.sentence: The vegetarian ordered mushroom pasta.
entries.chinese: vegetarian = 素食者；素食者点了蘑菇意面。

entries.sentence: This vehicle carries eight people.
entries.chinese: vehicle = 车辆；这辆车能载八个人。

entries.sentence: I downloaded the latest version.
entries.chinese: version = 版本；我下载了最新版本。

entries.sentence: The vet checked our cat.
entries.chinese: vet = 兽医；兽医检查了我们的猫。

entries.sentence: The hotel room has a sea view.
entries.chinese: view = 景色；这间酒店房间能看到海景。

entries.sentence: She plays the violin after school.
entries.chinese: violin = 小提琴；她放学后拉小提琴。

entries.sentence: A virus made his computer slow.
entries.chinese: virus = 病毒；病毒让他的电脑变慢了。

entries.sentence: You need a visa to enter the country.
entries.chinese: visa = 签证；进入这个国家需要签证。

entries.sentence: The visitor signed the book.
entries.chinese: visitor = 访客；访客在本子上签了名。

entries.sentence: Her voice was soft and calm.
entries.chinese: voice = 声音；她的声音轻柔而平静。

entries.sentence: Turn down the volume of the radio.
entries.chinese: volume = 音量；把收音机的音量调低。

entries.sentence: A volunteer helped at the race.
entries.chinese: volunteer = 志愿者；一名志愿者在比赛中帮忙。

entries.sentence: Each student has one vote.
entries.chinese: vote = 选票；每个学生有一张选票。

entries.sentence: A is a vowel in English.
entries.chinese: vowel = 元音字母；A 是英语里的元音字母。

entries.sentence: The weekly wage was low.
entries.chinese: wage = 工资；周工资很低。

entries.sentence: Walking is good exercise.
entries.chinese: walking = 步行；步行是很好的锻炼。

entries.sentence: The museum has photos from the war.
entries.chinese: war = 战争；博物馆有战争时期的照片。

entries.sentence: Her dresses hung in the wardrobe.
entries.chinese: wardrobe = 衣柜；她的连衣裙挂在衣柜里。

entries.sentence: The warning was printed in red.
entries.chinese: warning = 警告；警告用红色印着。

entries.sentence: This shirt needs a wash.
entries.chinese: wash = 洗涤；这件衬衫需要洗一下。

entries.sentence: The washing machine is noisy.
entries.chinese: washing machine = 洗衣机；这台洗衣机很吵。

entries.sentence: The washing-up was left in the sink.
entries.chinese: washing-up = 洗碗；要洗的碗盘留在了水槽里。

entries.sentence: We took photos of the waterfall.
entries.chinese: waterfall = 瀑布；我们拍了瀑布的照片。

entries.sentence: A large wave hit the rocks.
entries.chinese: wave = 海浪；一个大浪拍打着岩石。

entries.sentence: This way leads to the station.
entries.chinese: way = 路；这条路通向车站。

entries.sentence: A spider's web hung in the corner.
entries.chinese: web = 网；角落里挂着一张蜘蛛网。

entries.sentence: My webcam stopped working during the call.
entries.chinese: webcam = 网络摄像头；通话时我的网络摄像头坏了。

entries.sentence: The web page loaded slowly.
entries.chinese: web page = 网页；这个网页加载得很慢。

entries.sentence: The wedding was in June.
entries.chinese: wedding = 婚礼；婚礼在六月举行。

entries.sentence: Monday is a weekday.
entries.chinese: weekday = 工作日；星期一是工作日。

entries.sentence: We went camping at the weekend.
entries.chinese: weekend = 周末；我们周末去露营了。

entries.sentence: The warm welcome made us happy.
entries.chinese: welcome = 欢迎；热情的欢迎让我们很高兴。
